sections.title: When spoken to for the first time

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there.

lines.speaker: Friendly Forester
lines.text: Greetings, or nilsal, as they say in these parts! Have you come to talk forestry?

lines.speaker: Friendly Forester
lines.text: Greetings! Have you come to talk forestry?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Forestry?

lines.speaker: Friendly Forester
lines.text: That's right! In this day and age, we need those trained in the way of the forester now more than ever!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Way of the forester? What do you mean?

lines.speaker: Friendly Forester
lines.text: You know, helping the woodland flourish with your fellow foresters! And of course, drinking plenty of tea to fuel yourself while you do so!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sounds interesting. How can I get started?

lines.speaker: Friendly Forester
lines.text: Well, I'd recommend spending some more time in the forests before embarking on your forestry journey. Come back when you can fell a mighty oak!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll do that. Thanks for the information.

lines.speaker: Friendly Forester
lines.text: Good luck out there!

lines.speaker: Friendly Forester
lines.text: First, you'll need a forestry kit. Once you have one, all you need to do is chop some trees while you have it on you. The woodland will do the rest!

lines.speaker: Friendly Forester
lines.text: Oh, and if you find any anima-infused bark while tending to the forests, I'll gladly trade with you. My shop has all sorts of useful items.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's all rather vague...

lines.speaker: Friendly Forester
lines.text: It is, but I find it's better to let the forests do the talking. You'll understand once you get going. Speaking of which, would you like one of those kits now? I have them free of charge in my shop.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes please.

lines.speaker: Friendly Forester
lines.text: Excellent!

sections.title: Using pheasant tail feathers, fox whistle, or a golden pheasant egg on the Friendly Forester

lines.speaker: Friendly Forester
lines.text: I'll happily buy those off you in my shop.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there.

lines.speaker: Friendly Forester
lines.text: Hello again! How goes your forestry journey?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to trade with you.

lines.speaker: Friendly Forester
lines.text: Of course!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could you tell me more about forestry?

lines.speaker: Friendly Forester
lines.text: It's very simple. All you need is a forestry kit. I have them free of charge in my shop. Once you have one, just chop some trees while you have it on you. The woodland will do the rest!

lines.speaker: Friendly Forester
lines.text: Oh, and if you find any anima-infused bark while tending to the forests, I'll gladly trade with you. My shop has all sorts of useful items.

lines.speaker: Friendly Forester
lines.text: Speaking of which, would you like to trade now?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes please.

lines.speaker: Friendly Forester
lines.text: Excellent!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm good, thanks.

lines.speaker: Friendly Forester
lines.text: Very well.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Pretty good, thanks.

lines.speaker: Friendly Forester
lines.text: I'm glad to hear it.
